creator: var@schellong.biz
text:
Would be optimal:
ICH8:
SATA1: ad0
SATA2: ad1
SATA3: ad2
SATA4: ad3
SATA5: ad4 (enhanced mode only)
SATA6: ad5 (enhanced mode only)
JMicron:
SATA7: ad6
SATA8: ad7
PATA1: ad8
PATA2: ad9

But with enhanced mode ad0 changes to ad10 - and so on.
Where are then ad0, ad1, ...?
